name: open-plugins
description: Open-source Claude Code plugin marketplace — SDLC orchestration, skill management, and more

plugins.name: vbounce
plugins.description: V-Bounce AI-Native SDLC Orchestrator v5.1 — Agent-first architecture with unified TDD, per-phase specialized QG agents, mixed-model assignment, tech-aware context injection, explicit contracts, shared workspace, state management, and multi-layer quality assurance for complete software development lifecycle

plugins.name: skills-ontology
plugins.description: Intelligent skill management and retrieval — scan skills, build registries, validate ontology consistency, auto-adjust graph strengths, and generate visual graphs
